Skill Path: Beast Handling

You are a master in handling tamed beasts.

While developing your skills in Nature you chose to focus specifically on Beast Handling, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.nowEaHgIyij7im8F]{Train Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Rq5wkA8DtsmbzoGV]{Ride}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{Command an Animal}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.nowEaHgIyij7im8F]{Train Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Rq5wkA8DtsmbzoGV]{Ride}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pLjvgeqwHrYdg411]{Bonded Animal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gArdEleFCvUHtdGk]{Express Rider}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.f5JOSyW1tKMpz6hU]{Influence Nature}
